channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Passenger And Cruise
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Princess Cruises is offering fresh job opportunities. This vacancy is for a position on a cruise ship. Interested candidates can apply via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Jobs at Princess Cruises at Cruise Ship Careers UAE

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Adora Cruises is offering new career opportunities aboard their cruise ships. Interested candidates can apply via the provided link for potential positions within the maritime sector.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Jobs - Adora Cruises at All Cruise Jobs – Worldwide Ship Careers

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A cruise ship is seeking a qualified 2nd Engineer. This role offers a career of growth, opportunity, and adventure within the cruise, ferry, and yacht industry. Interested candidates are encouraged to apply directly.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job on Cruise Ship at V.Ships Leisure Recruitment

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 2nd Engineer position is available on a cruise ship. This role requires experience in marine engineering and the ability to maintain shipboard systems. The successful candidate will be responsible for the engine department's operations and ensuring all machinery functions correctly. Further details and application instructions can be found via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job on Cruise Ship at Cruise Careers

item.description:
Location: USA, UK
Description:

Hiring is open for all positions on cruise ships. Both freshers and experienced candidates are welcome to apply. Benefits include visa, ticket, and accommodation. Positions are available in the USA and UK. Salary ranges from 5500 to 16000 USD.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Cruise Ship Jobs - All Positions Available 5500 USD to 16000 USD at Cruise Line Recruitment

item.description:
Location: Liverpool, New South Wales
Description:

A Technical Superintendent is sought to manage Ro-Ro cargo ferries, ensuring safety, seaworthiness, and compliance. Responsibilities include overseeing daily operations, budget planning, surveys, and coordinating with Flag, Class, and insurers. A Qualified Marine Engineer is required for this shore-based role.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Technical Superintendent Job on Ro-Ro Vessel at Red The Consultancy

item.description:
Location: Worldwide
Description:

Princess Cruises is seeking individuals for a variety of shipboard and corporate positions globally. Shipboard roles include opportunities in Food & Beverage, Housekeeping, Entertainment, IT, Medical, Deck & Technical, HR, Security, and Spa. Corporate positions are available in Marketing, Finance, Legal, HR, IT, Operations, Supply Chain, and Entertainment Planning. This is a chance to work at sea or in the cruise industry with worldwide destinations and corporate office locations.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Princess Cruises Hiring Shipboard Corporate Roles at Princess Cruises
[Gold Job] Nurse / Healthcare Assistant for Passenger Cruise Ship at
[Gold Job] Purser on cruise ships at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Vessel type: Support Platform, Jack Up

Joining date: 02.02.2026

Salary: $97.29 per day

Contract duration: 8 weeks on/off

Requirements: Good English level; to be in possession of Offshore OPITO BOSIET (with CA-EBS or EBS) = FOET (with CA-EBS or EBS) = HUET with EBS certificate.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Steward on Support Platform - Offshore OPITO BOSIET Required at EUROCREW LTD
